posts.author: Emil_Younet (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want to be able to make groups only visible to admin or in the best case to a team. It would be to great to toggle it.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to make Notes about the past client meetings, shooting etc. on the clients shared board, without the client being able to see. There I also would like to store to dos for the client, but without the client knowing.
